content:
When we are gone, what tangible life will be left for us? Ken Arkind David
We are human. We build bridges and hold grudges Meghann Plunkett Humans
I wouldn't be who I am, without the friends who let me fly and help me land Kodaline I Wouldn't Be
I know you have felt much more love than you've shown Mumford and Sons Thistle and Weed
Winter Winds
We could turn around, or we could give it up, but we'll take what comes Imagine Dragons Walking the Wire
Stars are only visible in darkness Imagine Dragons Battle Cry
I know you have felt much more love than you've shown Mumford and Sons Thistle and Weed
I know you have felt much more love than you've shown Mumford and Sons Thistle and Weed
I know you have felt much more love than you've shown Mumford and Sons Thistle and Weed
I know you have felt much more love than you've shown Mumford and Sons Thistle and Weed
I know you have felt much more love than you've shown Mumford and Sons Thistle and Weed
I know you have felt much more love than you've shown Mumford and Sons Thistle and Weed
I know you have felt much more love than you've shown Mumford and Sons Thistle and Weed
What are men to rocks and mountains? Emily Bronte Pride and Prejudice
We are all fools in love Emily Bronte Pride and Prejudice
